bus.name: First Mile
bus.owner_description: FBX Sales, Inc. owns and operates all First Mile activities.
bus.description: **First Mile** owns the customer-facing experience from initial interest through contract signing.

functions.name: Home Sales
functions.description: Direct-to-consumer home sales through commissioned external partners.

functions.name: Component Sales (SIP / Pods)
functions.description: SIP panels and bathroom/kitchen pods sold through commissioned external partners.

functions.name: Building Contracts
functions.description: Contract execution and buyer handoff to construction.

functions.name: Entitlement / Permit
functions.description: Securing land entitlements, zoning approvals, and building permits.

bus.name: FBX Core
bus.owner: FBX Expansion, Inc / FBX Product Dev, Inc
bus.owner_description: FBX Expansion, Inc handles design, franchise, licensing and training. FBX Product Dev, Inc handles warehousing, import, and Kit of Parts.
bus.description: **FBX Core** is the industrial and commercial middle layer.

functions.name: Design
functions.description: Home design selection and customization with the buyer.

functions.name: Research & Development
functions.description: Product development, system improvements, new models.

functions.name: Franchise Sales
functions.description: Originating new franchise deals. $650K-$950K per franchise.

functions.name: Warehousing
functions.description: Storage and inventory management at Core hubs.

functions.name: Import (Foreign & Domestic)
functions.description: Sourcing components from domestic and international suppliers.

functions.name: Kit of Parts Creation
functions.description: Assembling components into shippable Kits of Parts. Inter-BU flow.

functions.name: Licensing / Royalties
functions.description: Ongoing 4-8% royalty on franchisee home sales. Inter-BU flow.

functions.name: Training
functions.description: Training assembly crews and franchise operators.

bus.name: Last Mile
bus.owner_description: Franchisees operate assembly and installation. External partners handle distribution, inspections, and delivery.
bus.description: **Last Mile** is the GC-led execution layer.

functions.name: Distribution to Assembly
functions.description: Logistics from Core hub to assembly factory.

functions.name: Assembly
functions.description: Factory assembly of the home from the Kit of Parts.

functions.name: Delivery Logistics
functions.description: Transport from assembly factory to the site.

functions.name: Installation Site Work
functions.description: Foundation, utilities, installation, and finishing on site.
